title: UPESSB PGT Result 2026 | Advt No. 02/2022
description: UP PGT 2026 Exam Result Post Update Date: 02-06-2026 Short Details: UPSESSB UP PGT 2022 Result 2026: UP Secondary Education Service Selection Board Admit Card 2026 has been released Soon on official website @https://www.upessc.up.gov.in/ and Exam Date is 09-10 May 2026 for UPPGT 2026 Admit Card whose, candidates who applied for the job of UPSESSB UP PGT 2022 Recruitment can download their admit card .
